candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; matches definition of total revenue/sales and equals Total Revenue numeric row.
Duplicate total revenue label; kept as secondary in case label changes across years.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Non-operating finance income, not top-line revenue.
Interest income component, not operating revenue.
Aggregate non-operating result; not revenue.
Tax line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Items that  be reclassified to statement of income
candidates.why: OCI item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income/(loss) for the period
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Direct cost of materials/consumables; best representation of cost of revenues/COGS.
Irregular legal provisions, not direct production or service costs.
Primarily operating overhead (personnel), more SG&A than direct COGS in this context.
General operating overhead, not strictly COGS.
Net operating result, not a pure COGS line.
R&D-specific, should map to XRD not COGS.
R&D expense, not generic COGS.
Inventory balance, not period COGS.
Clear SG&A-type overhead bucket.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. SG&A is composed of both personnel and other operating overhead. Candidate list only included 'Other operating expenses', but 'Employee benefit expenses' is also a core SG&A component and should be included to capture full overhead. Selected both component rows and avoided totals/balancing lines. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Employee benefit expenses

candidates.why: Portion of R&D that is capitalized; useful but incomplete alone.
Expensed portion of R&D; incomplete without capitalized portion.
Balance sheet capitalized R&D asset, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment; not current-period R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Explicit total R&D expense including expensed and capitalized components; best match for total R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value for R&D asset; not an expense.

final_choice.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; good candidate.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: More precise main interest expense net of capitalized amounts; best single measure of interest expense.
Profit allocation to NCI; not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; useful fallback if main lines missing.
Equity for minority holders; not interest expense.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests equity; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

candidates.row_label: Attributable to equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Income statement allocation, not a balance sheet equity stock measure.
Includes both parent and non-controlling interests; would cause double counting with separate MIB.
Technical balancing row; not intended as primary equity measure.
Technical balancing row; not intended as primary equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/claims, not just equity.

final_choice.row_label: Capital and reserves attributable to holders of the company

variables.notes: REVIEWED. For PROF, BE should exclude non-controlling interests. The balance sheet presents a parent-equity line 'Capital and reserves attributable to holders of the company' plus separate 'Non-controlling interests'. This parent-equity line is more appropriate than the candidate 'Total Equity', which includes NCI and would cause double counting when adding MIB. The chosen row is outside the provided candidate list, so manual review is flagged. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Capital and reserves attributable to holders of the company

candidates.why: Income statement minority share of profit, not equity stock; still confirms presence of NCI but not used for BE+MIB denominator.
Balance sheet equity attributable to non-controlling interests; best match for MIB.
Alternative label for same NCI balance; duplicate concept to avoid double counting.
Income statement minority interest in net income; not equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not equity stock.
